name: Boozey Rich Eggnog from a Cooked Base
recipeIngredient: 1 Vanilla bean or 1 tablespoon vanilla extract
recipeInstructions:
FOR BASE: In a heavy medium-sized saucepan, barely bring the milk to a boil with the vanilla bean (split lengthwise and scraped). Add seeds and pod. If using vanilla extract, add it after the eggnog base is cooked.
Over ice, strain yolks and sugar into a double boiler until thick and smooth (about 1 minute). Whisk in hot milk. Cook, stirring constantly around the bottom and corners with a spatula. Foam should subside. The eggnog base is ready when it coats a spoon without bare spots (12 to 15 minutes).
Immediately strain through a fine-mesh strainer while stirring to cool. When cooled, slowly whisk in all liquors (add vanilla extract if used). Store the eggnog base in the refrigerator for up to three days.
TO COMPLETE EGGNOG: At serving, remove vanilla bean and pour eggnog base into a large punch bowl. Beat egg whites with 3 tablespoons sugar until stiff peaks form; fold into eggnog. Whip cream until stiff peaks form and fold it in. Allow some lumps of cream and egg whites to float on top. Sprinkle with nutmeg. Serve immediately using a ladle.
